speaker: MATT
raw_text: Probably not. However, I would like to ask you all to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So the blue thing is the magical door?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: To give you guys some context, set-wise. This is the doorway, the entrance to Scanlan's mansion. Big as the doorway you could have made. Back here is Keyleth, who had fired off the spell. Here we have Vex and Trinket, who you had popped out, as well as Vax, who had just stepped out of the portal. Scanlan, with in front of you, the two boys.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: In front of him?! They were in front of him?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We were sending them off to be sold.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, but I thought you were holding out the chain and they were standing behind you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No, I was holding the chain and they stepped forward.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And Grog was off here to the side. Here we have Ghurrix himself as well as his ally companion and a number of other slavers and/or slaves that currently line the streets as part of this, who are now watching as this conflict may seem to erupt here.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Narrator slash Dungeon Master? What are those guards? There's guards in the city.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I looked for them the last game, and they're not around right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There are efreet. You didn't see any around at the moment, no. And they are called the Illuminated.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Does his companion have a name?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You don't know. You can certainly ask.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And what's behind the pit fiend where the map disappears? Is there building there or what?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There is an edge to a building there and part of a thoroughfare walkway.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: How many stories is the building behind them?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'd say probably two stories.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is that building made of sharp spikes that if we destroyed the building it would kill the bad guy?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay, and then Pike darts back in. There you go. All right, that ends the first round of combat. Next round, I'll actually be able to do some things. Vex, you're up. At the top of your turn, as you glance up, you can see (whooshing) this hellish devil creature. Its presence itself quakes you to the core. I need you to roll a wisdom saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, but nobody's hurt just yet. Spell bolsters allies with toughness and resolve.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Doesn't she have an evil thing? An anti-evil-people-thing? No?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Anti-evil-people.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Let us all cross our fingers that Blindspot finishes that thing they're shooting soon and she comes back to us.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: She just texted!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, did she? What did she say?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: She said, "I have a power that kills all evil people around me."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, good! I want to do that!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's not how that works.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: But there's a radius blast thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Radius blast, but that's not a second level or lower.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You know what, we'll say for the purposes of this, if you want to cast Aid on somebody, otherwise, right now, you'll have to miss the turn. Because we have to keep this going.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh god, okay, fine! I'll do Aid, I guess. Why not?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Up to three creatures within 30 feet. Their maximum hit points increase by five.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, that's going to be huge. So the only people that are in range are Trinket, Grog, and me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And Scanlan, technically.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And, technically, me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Grog, Pike, and Scanlan would all work if you wanted to do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So Grog, Pike, and Scanlan. You don't need it, though. Do you need it? I'm going to go Trinket--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Or you could do Channel Divinity, if you prefer that. No, it hasn't been seven days, so she can't do it yet. Since the Vorugal battle.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, Trinket, Scanlan, and Pike.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Trinket, Scanlan, and Pike. So that's five additional hit points to Trinket's maximum, to Scanlan's maximum, and to Pike's.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And then Pike's going to run back in the door.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yes. Real fast, just to make sure, I keep forgetting. The Sunbeam you had, and you took a bunch of hits from the erinyes? The damage you took from the erinyes. I need you to roll three constitution saving throws. I need to remember to do this. It's a lot to remember, guys. My apologies.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, make a persuasion roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Mid-battle bribery!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Persuasion, persuasion. 21.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You toss the gems, they scatter across the ground in front of this efreeti, holding its weapon to the side. He just snarls. All right, that ends your turn? Unless you want to move from your current position. You have half your movement now, so you can move 15 feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to move-- Is it stupid to move into the mansion?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to move into the mansion.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, you move into the mansion.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Thanks for abandoning us!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty, that ends Vex's turn. Keyleth, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I'm going to Sunbeam him again.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so saving throw. That would be 24.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So we all saw Vex wake up, throw a bag of money, and walk into my house. Very unusual. With a broom dragging behind her.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Trinket's going to run and stand next to Pike, to protect her.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to use my bonus action to turn into an air elemental.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, how much damage does it deal? It still takes half damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Right. Just a game of attrition, at this point.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh boy, guys, this is a fight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Hang on, sorry, trying to do math. (adding) 33 divided in half, so, shit. 11! No, 12! 33? 16!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 16 points of radiant damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm really nervous!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You drop the poison. When you go into your air elemental form, as your bonus action, the poison is cast out of your form. So you're no longer poisoned.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I still have movement, right?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: I need you to roll an acrobatics check to land this.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Did you write down the damage you took?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I did, I took it as I went, and then I erased it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I'll say, I don't think any attack did more than 26 to you-- It's my own fault for forgetting. It's fine. So you maintain your Sunbeam. We're good. All righty, so. You turn into an air elemental. Do you want to move or stay where you are?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I want to start heading up, gliding. I have a fly speed of 90, right? Can I get up to her?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can. There you go. That ends your turn. All righty, Grog.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Why does no one want to stay and play with me?! Can I step up on the ledge, like an assassin from Assassin's Creed, attach the Chain of Returning to my axe, and throw it at the back of the pit fiend?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Totally. Go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Reckless! But not great weapon master.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. That hits. Go ahead and roll damage on that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Right. Four points of necrotic, 28. Oh, plus I'm enlarged. 29.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 29 points of damage. The axe jams and embeds itself into the back. The pit fiend is like (snarling). The voice once again emanates from its telepathic push into your respective brains in the vicinity. "You have angered the city guard. You have no victory now."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, I'm not going to do any good up here. I still have my movement, right? I'm going to try some stupid shit. Since the axe is in his back, can I Indiana Jones down to the ground? (singing Indiana Jones theme song) Just, (yelling) trying to get down to the ground or underneath him. I may hit the ground, but maybe it will be slowed by the--?
